name: Mount
oneliner: The Insurer for the Agent Economy — agent risk evaluation, ADR certifications (SOC 2 for AI agents), and liability coverage when AI agents cause harm.
team: Category-defining product in agent liability insurance.
finserv: Directly addresses AI agent liability in financial transactions. ADR certification = trust infrastructure.
thesis: Mount is category-defining in the Dispute Resolution & Agent Liability gap — building the insurance and certification layer for autonomous AI agents. ADR certification (SOC 2 for AI agents) is exactly the trust credential that regulated environments will demand before deploying agents with financial authority. As agents proliferate in financial services, someone must underwrite the liability; Mount is the first mover in that structural gap.
